zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Chamberlain於1478年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，她的父親Richard Chamberlain29歲，母親Sybil Fowler30歲。她於1496年之後與Sir Edward Raleigh在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年9月2日之後在英國奧可福爾，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Chamberlain was born in 1478, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Chamberlain, was 29 and her mother, Sybil Fowler, was 30. She married Sir Edward Raleigh after 1496, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 2 September 1530, in Oxfordshire, England, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Chamberlain est née en 1478, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Chamberlain, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sybil Fowler, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Raleigh après 1496, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 2 septembre 1530, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat nach 1496 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Edward Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 2. September 1530 in Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Oxfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Chamberlainが1478年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Chamberlainは29歳，母Sybil Fowlerは30歳であった。1496年以後にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでSir Edward Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年9月2日以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Chamberlain(이)가 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Chamberlain(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Fowler(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1496년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Sir Edward Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 9월 2일 이후 영국 스퍼드실르에서 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Raleigh após 1496, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Chamberlain родилась в 1478 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Chamberlain было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Fowler, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Raleigh после 1496 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 2 сентябрь 1530 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности оксфордшир, Англия.
